ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks or score achieved by the student */,
  "selected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student has been selected for a program or scholarship */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (GPA) of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection process */,
  "selection_name" TEXT /* Name of the program or scholarship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selection process */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for selection */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the selection process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the selection process */,
  "max_applicants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of applicants allowed */,
  "number_selected" INTEGER /* Number of students selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_selections" (
  "student_selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student's application to a selection process */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student applying */,
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selection process */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the student applied */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., applied, shortlisted, selected) */,
  "application_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the application status was last updated */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview (if applicable) */,
  "interviewers" TEXT /* Names or IDs of the interviewers */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score of the application */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_selections_selection_id FOREIGN KEY ("selection_id") REFERENCES selections ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_selections_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  "program_coordinator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the program coordinator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_programs" (
  "student_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student's enrollment in a program */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, graduated) */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "actual_graduation_date" TEXT /* Actual graduation date (if applicable) */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA at the time of graduation */,
  "thesis_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the thesis (if applicable) */,
  "thesis_advisor" TEXT /* Name or ID of the thesis advisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_programs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose record was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
